description_long: This object is a stylized revolver-type firearm with a long, rectangular green barrel featuring angular cutouts and a subtle engraved design on one side. The cylinder is metallic gray and appears robust, with visible chambers for ammunition. The frame is a mix of gray and green, with a prominent hammer and a curved trigger guard. The grip is made of a smooth, brown wood-like material, ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a blend of industrial and classic revolver aesthetics. The object is compact and appears to be constructed primarily from metal and wood.
description: A stylized revolver with a long green barrel, metallic cylinder, and a brown ergonomic wooden grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the engraved green barrel, metallic cylinder, and brown wooden grip.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel's muzzle and the narrow profile of the grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the green barrel and the wooden grip.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the cylinder and the end of the grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long rectangular barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
